title: Rechargeable Light Bulbs with Remote Control, 3 Color + RGB USB Rechargeable Light Bulb, B22 LED Dimmable Battery Light Bulb Up to 24H, A60 Emergency LED Light Bulbs with Touch Control(2 PK)
features: Multi-Colour USB Rechargeable Bulb: BrightArk rechargeable bulb offers 3 colour temperatures (warm white, natural white, cool white) and RGB options. Whether it's for daily lighting, power outage emergencies, outdoor camping, hosting a party, or creating a romantic atmosphere, it's easy to switch to the most appropriate lighting effect for any occasion. As a multi-functional rechargeable bulb, it is suitable for a variety of indoor and outdoor lighting scenarios.

Wireless Bulb With Portable Hook & Remote Control: Our rechargeable bulb included hooks make outdoor hanging simple, ideal for camping or places where is no power outlet and wires. Remote control allows you to easily adjust between 3 colour and RGB, brightness levels, and 2 lighting modes (flash and smooth modes). also features a timer function for 15/30/60 minutes to help you manage your lighting time effectively. Enjoy the freedom of wireless lighting with our portable and versatile bulbs.

Touch Control Rechargeable Lights: Easily switch between light colours and dynamic modes with a short press when the bulb is on. Long press to turn on the bulb when it's off, and long press again for stepless dimming when it's on. the touch control allows you to easily switch between light colours and dynamic modes when the bulb is on. Experience the simplicity and convenience of touch control with our advanced bulbs.

Durable & USB-C Charging: BrightArk remote control light bulb (with 2600mAh battery) delivers emergency lighting for up to 24 hours at full natural brightness (100%). Features USB-C charging to full power in just 5 hours. No Wiring for Power Cuts needed – recharge at home during outages, take it camping, or instantly light up any closet. Clear status indicators: red (charging) and green (fully charged).

Energy Efficient & Brighter: Our led rechargeable light B22 features a standard LED bulb in an A60 size that is compatible with most LED bulb fixtures. Ideal for indoor lighting, outdoor events, or as an emergency light during power outages. Enjoy bright, comfortable light while saving energy and money.

Package Includes: 2 x B22 A60 rechargeable bulbs with B22 hook lampholders, 1 x remote control, 2 x USB-C cables and 1 x manual. Perfect for living room/bedroom/portable outdoor use(camping, hiking, fishing, trekking, etc.) and holiday decoration. Convenient USB-powered design for easy transport. Any questions about the products, please feel free to contact us for help, we will ensure you will get a 24hr online response.
